creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
Regarding fluxbox configuration :

- it is built with gnome, imlib2, nls, remember, slit, systray, toolbar, xinerama and xrender options.

- it doesn't seem related to the runtime configuration for my account. If I move $HOME/.fluxbox aside before logging in, it crashes at shutdown as well

- the gui login setup is rather minimal : xdm and my $HOME/.xsession is only :
xset -dpms
mixer vol 70:70
exec startfluxbox
